<!-- indicator: fig-at-least-1-bup-aar -->

```{python}
#| echo: false
#| warning: false
#| message: false
#| label: fig-at-least-1-bup-aar
#| fig-cap: 'Patients Who Received at Least One Buprenorphine Prescription for Opioid Use Disorder, Age-Adjusted Rate per 100,000 Population, 2020–2023'
#| fig-alt: 'Data visualization showing Patients Who Received at Least One Buprenorphine Prescription for Opioid Use Disorder, Age-Adjusted Rate per 100,000 Population, 2020–2023.'
from scripts.cha_registry_renderer import render_figure_object
render_figure_object(figure_id="fig-at-least-1-bup-aar", workbook_path=CHA_WORKBOOK_PATH).show()
```
